global.description: The ad features a food delivery app interface with promotional text and call-to-action buttons.
global.main_message: Promoting quick dinner options with late-night deals.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Food delivery app interface

elements.label: Food delivery app interface

elements.label: Try for free button
elements.description: A smaller button with 'Try for free' text, located in the lower center of the ad.

elements.label: Dinner promotion text
elements.description: Bold text in the center stating 'Dinner in minutes' with a subtitle 'Late-night deals available'.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Late-night deals available

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: The logo of the app 'QuickFork' displayed prominently at the top left.

elements.label: SALE badge

elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.
